name: Amada Co. Ltd.
lede: Amada runs three capability centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Faridabad and Chennai, covering CoE, it and sales & marketing, built over 30 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amada office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Amada Co. Ltd. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amada runs 3 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Faridabad, Chennai), covering CoE, it and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Amada's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Faridabad and Chennai, spanning CoE, it and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Sales & Marketing and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all five decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Amada operate in India?
faq.a: Amada operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Amada have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Amada's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Faridabad and Chennai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Amada run in India?
faq.a: Amada runs CoE, it and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Amada's India GCCs?
faq.a: Amada's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Amada's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 5 leaders at Amada's India centers, across Finance and HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
